oddities.note: Section 1 contains only the short title and reference to table of contents; minimal substantive legislative language from which to extract entities. The full name of the act (Language-Inclusive Support and Transparency for Online Services Act of 2023) is confirmed as the enacting statute with citation H.R. 3806.
